claim: The exact 20-update seed195-lineage celebration-family J-lens intrinsic word reward alone, apart from KL beta 0.02, improves untouched GSM8K exact match.

concurrent_dispatch.scientific_reason: The controls are prospectively fixed and independent of the public treatment curve, so concurrent dispatch changes wall-clock scheduling only.

curve_gate.criterion: M4 > M0, M10 >= M4, and M20 >= M10 on the four-treatment-seed mean
curve_gate.failure_action: stop_without_protected_final; preserve and report all eight already-dispatched public runs

acceptance.primary: all four treatment-minus-signflip seed effects strictly positive, no ties, positive mean; exact two-sided sign p=0.125
acceptance.secondary: all four treatment-minus-base seed effects strictly positive, no ties, positive mean; exact two-sided sign p=0.125

fresh_execution_identity.modal_app_name_policy: allocate and pin a fresh V13 app identity before launch
fresh_execution_identity.modal_volume_policy: allocate and pin a fresh empty version-2 Volume before launch

authorized_verifier_rule.reason: V12 exposed a second valid float32 duplicate-reduction pair whose absolute difference was exactly one float32 ULP (1.1920928955078125e-7 at approximately 1.04), just above the earlier decimal 1e-7 cutoff.
authorized_verifier_rule.reward_mean_identity: unchanged: reward and the sole named J-lens reward mean must match within absolute tolerance 1e-12 and zero relative tolerance
authorized_verifier_rule.reward_std_identity: both nonnegative finite duplicate reward-standard-deviation scalars must round to float32 encodings at most one ULP apart
authorized_verifier_rule.schema_and_j_only_checks: unchanged: exactly one named reward mean, no GSM8K reward key, exact optimizer steps, finite bounded reward values, literal-rate bounds, and all other one-J-reward checks remain required
authorized_verifier_rule.required_regressions: accept the exact V12 adjacent-float32 pair 1.042350172996521/1.0423502922058105 and reject a two-ULP perturbation

prohibited: resume, retry, warm-start, or pool any earlier run, checkpoint, curve row, or statistic

change the celebration words, calibration, J-lens windows, component weights, optimizer, 20-update horizon, 0/4/10/20 curve nodes, curve gate, controls, estimands, threshold, or final collection after launch
use signflip public-curve outcomes in the treatment curve gate
unlock or inspect the protected final before the treatment curve passes and all eight terminal runs verify
switch candidates based on V13 outcome data
multiplicity_caveat: The alpha-0.15 tests and p=0.125 threshold are nominal for this adaptively selected broader research program; they are not familywise-error corrected across prior development curves or attempts. V13 must not be described as an independent untouched replication.
